texto: It is as if a Mohammedan, while recognizing the divine mission of the Arab prophet, were to write for his son a treatise on the ethics of the New Testament as better adapted than the moral system of the Koran for the training and confirming of a young man in the practice of virtue.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Andrew P. Peabody: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “It is as if a Mohammedan, while recognizing the divine mission of the Arab prophet, were to write…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, christianity, islam pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e islam.
